title: User-specified functions should not be called
description: User-specified functions should not be calledAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellThis rule template allows to define rules that ban the call of some functions, for instance functions provided for legacy reasons. It will not prevent calling member functions or macros with the same name.It comes with two parameters:namesdefines a comma-separated list of function names to ban. You can specify a standalone name, in which case the rule will match functions with that name in any namespaces, or a qualified name (for instance,printwill matchstd::print, but::printwill not)messageis the message to display when the rule is violated.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: User-specified functions should not be called. Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
